title: New to Monday.com and need help with contacts>leads
excerpt: We have a qualifying process on our leads to create a contact but once a lead is qualified it does not result in a deal because we can potentially have multiple deals from 1 lead/contact. What is the best way to set this…

posts.author: skress31 (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a qualifying process on our leads to create a contact but once a lead is qualified it does not result in a deal because we can potentially have multiple deals from 1 lead/contact. What is the best way to set this up and then manage a sales team with it?
